title: Andrew Ure
body: Andrew Ure FRS (18 May 1778 – 2 January 1857) was a Scottish medical doctor, chemist, scriptural geologist, and early business theorist who founded the Garnet Hill Observatory. He was a fellow of the Royal Astronomical Society and the Royal Society. Ure published a number of books based on his industrial consulting experiences.
